jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at IndiaMart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
